title: cyrtomium fortunei var. clivicola
intro: Cyrtomium fortunei var. clivicola, also known as the Mountain Holly Fern or Mountain Lady Fern, is a variety of fern plant native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Cyrtomium fortunei var. clivicola is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a component in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
